name: Premium Car Shampoo
description: Professional-grade car shampoo that safely removes dirt and grime without damaging paint. pH-balanced formula for all car types.

name: Premium Car Shampoo (1L)
description: Professional-grade car shampoo that safely removes dirt and grime without damaging paint. Perfect for regular car washing.

name: Premium Car Shampoo (5L)
description: Bulk economy size of professional-grade car shampoo. Ideal for commercial use or frequent car owners.

name: Foam Car Shampoo
description: Rich foaming car shampoo that creates thick lather for easy cleaning. Leaves a protective shine on paint.

name: Foam Car Shampoo (1L)
description: Rich foaming car shampoo in larger size. Perfect for weekly car washing routines.

name: Car Cleaning Chemical - Degreaser
description: Powerful degreaser for removing heavy dirt, oil stains, and grime from car exterior and engine bay.

name: Car Cleaning Chemical - Bug Remover
description: Special formula to remove stubborn bug splatter and tar spots from windshield and paint without damage.

name: Car Cleaning Chemical - Wheel Cleaner
description: Specialized wheel cleaner that removes brake dust and grime from alloy and steel wheels effectively.

name: Car Freshener - Vanilla
description: Long-lasting vanilla-scented car freshener. Choose between spray, gel, or hanging variants.

name: Car Freshener - Vanilla (Gel)
description: Gel-based vanilla car freshener for longer-lasting fragrance. Place on car dashboard or under seat.

name: Car Freshener - Vanilla (Hanging)
description: Hanging vanilla-scented car air freshener. Classic style with natural fragrance.

name: Car Freshener - Lemon
description: Fresh lemon-scented car spray freshener. Eliminates odors and provides citrus fragrance.

name: Car Freshener - Lemon (Gel)
description: Lemon-scented gel freshener for longer fragrance duration. Long-lasting odor elimination.

name: Car Freshener - Lemon (Hanging)
description: Hanging lemon car air freshener. Refreshing citrus scent for your vehicle.

name: Car Freshener - Ocean Fresh
description: Crisp ocean-fresh scented spray freshener. Perfect for lovers of clean, marine fragrances.

name: Car Freshener - Ocean Fresh (Gel)
description: Ocean-fresh scented gel freshener with extended fragrance duration.

name: Car Freshener - Ocean Fresh (Hanging)
description: Hanging ocean-fresh car air freshener. Brings a marine atmosphere to your car.

name: Car Freshener - Rose
description: Elegant rose-scented car spray freshener. Premium floral fragrance for car interiors.

name: Car Freshener - Rose (Gel)
description: Rose-scented gel freshener with long-lasting fragrance and elegant aroma.

name: Car Freshener - Rose (Hanging)
description: Hanging rose-scented car air freshener. Classic elegance for your vehicle.
